plugins.name: Epic Games Store
plugins.description: Sync your Epic Games Store library to Otix. Auto-import owned games, track playtime, and get notified about free weekly games.
plugins.author: Diogo da Silva

plugins.name: Radarr Sync
plugins.description: Sync an Otix list with multiple Radarr instances. Add movies to your watchlist and they auto-download with full quality profile and root folder configuration.
plugins.author: Diogo da Silva

plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: A test plugin that validates the Otix plugin system by demonstrating event subscriptions, local database, API calls, notifications, and logging.
plugins.author: Diogo da Silva
